info.description: REST API for the Quantix algorithmic crypto trading platform.
info.title: Quantix Trading API

get.description: Returns all running engines across all users (admin only)

delete.description: Force-stop any engine regardless of owner (admin only)

put.description: Activate or deactivate a user account (admin only)

post.description: Authenticate and receive a JWT token

get.description: Returns paginated list of backtest jobs for the current user

post.description: Start an asynchronous backtest job and return its ID

get.description: Returns the status and result of a specific backtest job

delete.description: Delete a backtest job record by ID

get.description: Returns all saved exchange API credentials (keys are masked)

post.description: Save a new exchange API key and secret (encrypted at rest)

put.description: Update an existing exchange API credential by ID

delete.description: Permanently delete an exchange API credential

post.description: Test exchange API connectivity and return USDT balance

get.description: Returns all running and recently stopped engines for the authenticated user

post.description: Start a new live or paper trading engine for the authenticated user

get.description: Returns the status and info for a specific engine

delete.description: Gracefully stop a running engine by its ID

get.description: Returns equity snapshot history for chart display
Returns paginated fill history with optional filters
Returns paginated order history with optional filters
Returns live open positions with unrealized P&L for all running engines
Returns all registered trading strategy identifiers
Returns aggregated dashboard stats: equity, P&L, win rate, engine status
Returns the authenticated user's profile information
Returns the current user's Telegram notification configuration

put.description: Save Telegram bot token and chat ID for notifications

post.description: Send a test message through configured notification channels

get.description: Returns API and database health status
